category_url.title: Category URL
category_url.description: The AliExpress Category or Search URL to scrape (e.g., https://www.aliexpress.com/category/200000343/consumer-electronics.html or https://www.aliexpress.com/w/wholesale-smart-watch.html).

max_items.title: Max Items to Scrape
max_items.description: Maximum number of products to scrape from the category across all pages.

target_country.title: Target Delivery Country Context
target_country.description: ISO 2-letter country code used to set regional pricing, warehouse availability, and shipping calculations (e.g., US, EG, UK, DE).

target_currency.title: Target Currency Code
target_currency.description: 3-letter currency code for output prices (e.g., USD, EGP, EUR, GBP).

scrape_product_details.title: Deep Scrape Product Detail Pages
scrape_product_details.description: If enabled, the scraper visits every individual product listing page to extract deep 17-point details including full reviews, exact shipping breakdown, specs, and selling points. If disabled, extracts fast lightweight items directly from the category listing cards.

proxy_configuration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy_configuration.description: Proxy setup to bypass AliExpress anti-bot protection. Apify Residential Proxies are strongly recommended.
